title: Proclamation No. 287, s. 1938
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 287

RESERVING FOR PLAZA PURPOSES TWO PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SORSOGON, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for plaza purposes, under the administration of the municipality of Sorsogon, Sorsogon, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following-described parcels of the public domain, situated in the municipality of Sorsogon, Province of Sorsogon, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15279, to wit:

Lot No. 3291.—Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan Swo-15279, N. 13° 04’ E. 32.38 m. from B. L. L. M. No. 2, municipality of Sorsogon, thence S. 75° 32’ E. 19.22 m. to point 2; S. 12° 11’ W. 11.95 m. to point m. to point 3; S. 11° 10’ W. 22.91 m. to point 4; N. 71° 29’ W. 21.41 m. to point 5; N. 15° 03’ E. 33.30 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 688 square meters.

Point 1, P. L. S./B. L. concrete monument; points 2 and 4, stakes; point 3, stone; point 5, B. L. concrete monument.

Bounded on the northeast, by Calle Laguardia; on the southeast, by lot No. 3292; on the southwest, by Calle Marina; and on the northwest, by Calle Bonifacio.

Lot No. 3293.—Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan Swo-15279, S. 13° 01’ W. 45.43 m. from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Sorsogon, thence N. 13° 01’ E. 45.43 m. to point 2; S. 66° 12’ E. 20.92 m. to point 3; S. 16° 18’ W. 24.43 m. to point 4; S. 13° 10’ W. 17.82 m. to point 5; N. 74° 54’ W. 19.11 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 858 square meters.

Point 1, P. L. S./B. L. concrete monument; point 2, B. L. L. M. No. 1; points 3, 4, and 5, stakes.

Bounded on the northeast, by Calle Rizal; on the southeast, by lots Nos. 3295 and 3294; on the southwest, by Calle Laguardia; and on the northwest, by Calle Bonifacio.

Bearings true. Declination, 1° 01’ E.

Points referred to are marked on plan Swo-15279.

Surveyed: March 18-19, 1924.

Approved: February 19, 1938.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this nineteenth day of July, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-eight, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the third.

[SEAL]

President of the Philippines

By the President:

Secretary to the President
